heading: How Does the Atlas Query Compare to MongoDB and SQL Queries?
body:
[$sort](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/sort) corresponds to the `ORDER BY ...` clause
in a SQL (Structured Query Language) `SELECT` statement.

> **Example:** You have 3,235 articles. You would like to see a list of articles
> sorted alphabetically by headline.
>
> SQL
>
> ```sql
> SELECT * FROM article
> ORDER BY headline ASC;
> ```
>
> MongoDB Aggregation
>
> ```javascript
> db.article.aggregate(
>   { $sort : { headline : 1 } }
> );
> ```
>
> Atlas
>
>  Sort Option
>
> ```javascript
> $sort : { headline : 1 }
> ```

codeBlocks.content:
SELECT * FROM article
ORDER BY headline ASC;
